name: stockyard-agentguard
description: Per-session limits for AI agents: max calls, cost, duration. Kill runaway agent sessions before they drain your budget.

tools.name: agentguard_sessions
tools.description: List active agent sessions with call counts, cost, and duration.

tools.name: agentguard_kill
tools.description: Kill a specific agent session by ID.

tools.name: agentguard_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate stats: sessions tracked, killed, costs saved.
